title: Reporting to Police 警察局报案

lines.en: Good evening. What brings you to the station?
lines.zh: 晚上好。您来警察局有什么事？

lines.en: I'd like to report a theft. My bike was stolen this afternoon.
lines.zh: 我想报一起盗窃案。我的自行车今天下午被偷了。

lines.en: I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me where it happened?
lines.zh: 很遗憾。您能告诉我在哪里发生的吗？

lines.en: It was parked outside the library on Main Street.
lines.zh: 它停在主街图书馆外面。

lines.en: What time did you notice it was missing?
lines.zh: 您什么时候发现它不见的？

lines.en: Around four o'clock when I came out of the library.
lines.zh: 大约四点钟，我从图书馆出来的时候。

lines.en: Can you describe the bike for me?
lines.zh: 您能描述一下自行车吗？

lines.en: It's a red mountain bike with a black seat and a white basket.
lines.zh: 是一辆红色的山地车，黑色座椅，白色篮子。

lines.en: Thank you. Please fill out this report form and we'll look into it.
lines.zh: 谢谢。请填写这张报案表，我们会调查的。
